ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term associated with the instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Detailed definition of the instrument */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the instrument (e.g., Sensor, Instrument) */,
  "source_vocab_uri" TEXT /* Source vocabulary URI for the instrument type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was acquired */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was retired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument type e.g., Sensor, Instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Parent type of the instrument type (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the instrument usage */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the usage in hours */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed using the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_usage_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Next due date for maintenance */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician performing the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or affiliation of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, update) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_calibration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration history record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of calibration */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the calibration performed */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration (e.g., standard weights, reference samples) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_calibration_history_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the instrument (e.g., operational, maintenance required) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_status_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date of certification */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the certification */,
  "document_link" TEXT /* Link to the certification document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_certifications_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being shared */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borrower */,
  "lender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lender */,
  "borrow_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was borrowed */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument is expected to be returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_sharing_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_sharing_lender_id FOREIGN KEY ("lender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_sharing_borrower_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrower_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty or area of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)
